name: Group 3 Bike Sensor final packet-window comfort points

metadata.feature_model: rawer packet-level handoff: one point per received uplink/window at the real packet GPS coordinate
metadata.position_model: speed backprojection from current packet GPS; distance uses avg_speed_kmh_window and bucket center offset; heading uses reverse previous-to-current GPS bearing
metadata.packet_drop_handling: dropped packets are not hidden; larger previous/current gaps are recorded in interpolation_gap_s and downgraded in position_estimation_quality
metadata.roughness_proxy_warning: relative map helper only; ISO-2631-inspired RMS emphasis but not standards-compliant
metadata.bucket_geometry: no bucket geometry; both bucket values are properties on the packet GPS point

properties.measurement_model: one real packet GPS point with two 12.5s measurement buckets from the previous 25s window
properties.geometry_note: Geometry is the real GPS coordinate included in the packet, not an estimated bucket position.
properties.roughness_proxy_note: packet-level helper fields summarize the two bucket roughness values; use bucket-level GeoJSON if spatial separation is desired
